Analyzes critical-path latency; compares two optimization ROIs quantitatively. Analyze with quant — analyze@L4.
Asks to design cache invalidation strategy (content hash, selective invalidation, TTL) with cost analysis. Design@L5.
Asks to design timeout budget allocation across tools; probabilistic analysis. bloom=evaluate; Design@L5.
Asks to evaluate/select best model across 3 objectives using Pareto frontier; genuine evaluation with tradeoffs. Evaluation@L5.

Reasons about optimal CF via 3-way tradeoff (quality/memory/comm); bloom=evaluate. Evaluation@L5.
Apply/compute given setup: estimate new activation memory and compute cost. Quantitative computation from memory formula. Fluency@L3.
Explains why forward-mode is catastrophically expensive (1B x ratio) and when preferable. Explain mechanism — analyze@L4.

Analyzes per-SM vs aggregate bandwidth; explains why L2 skip is unsound with quantitative comparison. Analyze@L4.
Asks to explain MFU/HFU distinction and which to trust; definitional + quantitative. Analyze@L4.
Explains util-delay tradeoff via M/M/1 queueing theory with quantitative wait-time math. Analyze@L4.

Asks to design robust data-quality pipeline recognizing domain-quality conflation bias. Design@L5.
Asks to design data-mixing strategy via proxy-model search with epoch-count constraints. Design@L5.

Evaluates library vs custom kernel across 4 axes with quant ROI/savings. Multi-criteria evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Asks to propose systems-level approach to navigate fairness-accuracy Pareto frontier; designs infrastructure. Design@L5.
Asks to design compliance pipeline mapping 4 legal reqs to systems infra (bias, monitoring, lineage, explanations). Design@L5.
Evaluates on-the-fly vs streaming feature architecture quantitatively against 15ms SLA. True architectural evaluation. Evaluation@L5.

Diagnoses training plateau as FP16 weight-update underflow (precision gap); root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses long-context retrieval failure as BF16 mantissa truncation of position IDs; root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses MoE routing collapse at step 2000 as FP16 logit overflow → NaN softmax. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Explains why per-channel KV quantization fails (temporal outliers crush precision); compares grouped quant. Analyze@L4.
Diagnoses NaN loss at 256k vocab as FP16 softmax denominator sum overflow. Root-cause with exp sum math. Diagnosis@L4.
Explains how AWQ restores accuracy via salient-channel scaling without changing 4-bit format. Mechanism explanation. Analyze@L4.
Explains K vs V quantization-sensitivity asymmetry via softmax exponential amplification. Mechanism analysis. Analyze@L4.
Diagnoses H2D latency spike 130→600ms as PCIe switch upstream-link oversubscription (4:1). Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses pipeline-flush latency as RoCEv2 PFC-triggered HoL blocking from incast buffer overflow. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses 11GB/s PCIe ceiling as pageable-memory memcpy + NUMA-crossing UPI bottleneck. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Evaluates KD vs LoRA for multi-tenant serving; bloom=evaluate; quantifies VRAM and batching advantages. Evaluation@L5.
Diagnoses <5% MXU util at BS=1 as 128x128 systolic array mismatch with matrix-vector dataflow. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Asks for hw-algo co-design (expert pinning + expert-choice routing); bloom=evaluate. Design@L5.
Diagnoses 22% accuracy drop as E4M3 clipping massive activation outliers; proposes E5M2 activations. Diagnosis@L4.
Asks to co-design hw-compiler tiling for 16MB SRAM (FlashAttention-style blocks); bloom=evaluate. Design@L5.
Explains why 60% unstructured sparsity yields 0% speedup on dense Tensor Cores; compares to 2:4 structured. Analyze@L4.
Diagnoses MLP co-location latency spike as L2 thrashing by memory-bound embedding model; recommends MIG. Diagnosis@L4.
Explains why 100 tok/s SLA is physically impossible at BS=1; roofline analysis of memory-bound decoding. Analyze@L4.
Explains that H100 upgrade won't give 3x speedup because workload is HBM-capacity bound; recommends FlashAttention. Analyze@L4.
Explains why per-token latency stays constant when batch grows 8x in memory-bound regime. Roofline analysis. Analyze@L4.
Evaluates TP=8 vs PP=8 for memory-bound decoding; quantifies aggregate-bandwidth advantage. Evaluation@L5.
Asks to design AOT-compilation pipeline across 12 hardware/driver targets with HITL. Design@L5.
Diagnoses 185ms latency as unsupported-op fallback shattering the graph (60 NPU-CPU round-trips). Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses end-to-end latency spike as edge uplink saturation during high-trigger festival, not cloud compute. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses 3 tok/s on W4A16 as unfused dequant causing 13.5GB/token memory traffic. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses night accuracy collapse as PTQ calibration dominated by bright images → INT8 range wasted on outliers. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses 80ms pipeline latency (vs 30ms sum) as NPU SRAM weight-swap overhead between models. Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses NPU+CPU slower than all-GPU as graph-partition sync overhead (72 CPU-NPU crossings). Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Evaluates whether 21.6% throughput loss is acceptable; compares measured vs theoretical overhead with FlashAttn alternative. Evaluation@L5.
Diagnoses OOM despite stable peak as allocator fragmentation (74GB reserved vs 68GB allocated). Root-cause. Diagnosis@L4.
Evaluates two models on cost/accuracy/latency at fixed SLA with TRT INT8 profiling. True architecture evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates gang vs elastic scheduling via failure-probability math over week-long run. True comparative evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates whether GPU utilization is right HPA signal; quantifies scale-up latency gap. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates instantaneous vs annual PUE measurement with $ impact calculation. True evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates free-cooling viability for H100 DLC in Austin via wet-bulb + ASHRAE 1% data. True feasibility evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates carbon cost of H100 vs TPU v5e via Chinchilla FLOPs + MFU + grid intensity. True architecture evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates exact-URL vs MinHash dedup via proxy-model benchmark; quantifies quality vs time tradeoff. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates proportional vs temperature-scaled mixing via HumanEval/GSM8K/MMLU benchmarks. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates full vs incremental checkpoint strategies across storage, recovery, overhead; recommends hybrid. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates unified vs separate feature-store architectures on consistency, latency, ops complexity. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates FlashAttention-2 vs standard attention on H100 across 1K/4K/16K seq lengths. Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates fused vs unfused MLP via roofline AI analysis (1797 vs 295 ridge). Evaluation@L5.
Evaluates FP16 vs INT8 vs INT4 KV cache on HBM, throughput, quality. Multi-option evaluation. Evaluation@L5.
